name: 51视频 - 吃瓜爆料
desc: 全网最新吃瓜爆料与福利视频

js.category: async function getCategory() { return [ { id: 'wpcz', text: '今日推荐' }, { id: 'lpjp', text: '撸片精品' }, { id: 'meiridasai', text: '每日大赛' }, { id: 'rdsj', text: '吃瓜爆料' }, { id: 'lljx', text: '伦理精选' }, { id: 'xsxy', text: '学生校园' }, { id: 'tynd', text: '体育男大' }, { id: 'smtt', text: '色漫天堂' }, { id: 'whhl', text: '网红黑料' }, { id: 'ysyl', text: '看片娱乐' }, { id: 'cqdb', text: '超前点播' }, { id: 'qubk', text: '奇趣百科' }, { id: '51yc', text: '51原创' }, { id: 'dyds', text: '短剧影视' } ]; }
js.home: async function getHome(page = 1) { try { const baseUrl = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net'; const url = page === 1 ? baseUrl : `${baseUrl}/page/${page}/`; const response = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); const html = await response.text(); const list = []; const articleRegex = /<article[\s\S]*?<a\s+href="([^"]+)"[\s\S]*?<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>[\s\S]*?(?:background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)|<img[^>]*src="([^"]+)")[\s\S]*?<\/article>/g; let match; while ((match = articleRegex.exec(html)) !== null) { const link = match[1]; const title = match[2].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim(); const pic = match[3] || match[4] || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png'; if (title && link && !title.includes('广告')) { list.push({ vod_id: link, vod_name: title, vod_pic: pic, vod_remarks: '吃瓜爆料', vod_play_from: '51视频' }); } } const pagecount = 1232; return { page, pagecount, list }; } catch (error) { return { page, pagecount: 1, list: [] }; } }
js.detail: async function getDetail(id) { try { const baseUrl = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net'; const url = id.startsWith('http') ? id : baseUrl + id; const response = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); const html = await response.text(); let title = ''; const titleMatch = html.match(/<h1[^>]*class="post-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h1>/) || html.match(/<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>/); if (titleMatch) title = titleMatch[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim(); let pic = ''; const picMatch = html.match(/<meta[^>]*property="og:image"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"/); if (picMatch) pic = picMatch[1]; let videoUrl = ''; const dplayerMatch = html.match(/data-config='([\s\S]*?)'\s*>/); if (dplayerMatch) { try { const config = JSON.parse(dplayerMatch[1].replace(/"/g, '"')); if (config.video && config.video.url) videoUrl = config.video.url; } catch (e) {} } if (!videoUrl) { const videoMatch = html.match(/(https?:\/\/[^"'\s]+\.(?:m3u8|mp4|flv)[^"'\s]*)/gi); if (videoMatch) videoUrl = videoMatch[0]; } let playUrl = ''; if (videoUrl) { playUrl = '在线播放$' + videoUrl; } else { playUrl = '在线播放$' + url; } return { vod_id: id, vod_name: title || '51视频', vod_pic: pic || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: '点击播放', vod_play_from: '51视频', vod_play_url: playUrl, vod_content: '热门吃瓜爆料视频' }; } catch (error) { return { vod_id: id, vod_name: '51视频', vod_pic: 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: '加载失败', vod_play_from: '51视频', vod_play_url: '在线播放$' + id, vod_content: '加载失败' }; } }
js.search: async function getSearch(keyword, page = 1) { try { const baseUrl = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net'; const encodedKeyword = encodeURIComponent(keyword); const url = page === 1 ? `${baseUrl}/?s=${encodedKeyword}` : `${baseUrl}/page/${page}/?s=${encodedKeyword}`; const response = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); const html = await response.text(); const list = []; const articleRegex = /<article[\s\S]*?<a\s+href="([^"]+)"[\s\S]*?<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>[\s\S]*?(?:background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)|<img[^>]*src="([^"]+)")[\s\S]*?<\/article>/g; let match; while ((match = articleRegex.exec(html)) !== null) { const link = match[1]; const title = match[2].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim(); const pic = match[3] || match[4] || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png'; if (title && link) { list.push({ vod_id: link, vod_name: title, vod_pic: pic, vod_remarks: '搜索结果', vod_play_from: '51视频' }); } } return { page, pagecount: 1, list }; } catch (error) { return { page, pagecount: 1, list: [] }; } }
